name: AI-Accelerated Starter Pack
description: Structured delivery process for Salesforce Service Cloud implementations

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Initialize the project repo with client details and configuration

steps.name: Initialize Project
steps.description: Set up repo with client name, tier, and transcripts

inputFields.label: Project Name
inputFields.description: Optional project name (defaults to client name)

phases.name: Discovery
phases.description: Gather materials and upload transcripts and client documents

steps.name: Upload Call Transcripts
steps.description: Upload sales handoff call transcripts

steps.name: Upload Client Documents
steps.description: Upload SOW, org charts, and other client documents

phases.name: Requirements Worksheet
phases.description: Generate, review, and iterate the requirements worksheet until customer confirms

steps.name: Generate/Update Requirements Worksheet
steps.description: Create or update the pre-filled worksheet from transcripts, SOW, and client docs. Each iteration preserves previous versions (v1, v2, vN)

inputFiles.label: Client Documents
inputFiles.description: Select SOW, org charts, and other client docs

inputFiles.label: Existing Worksheets
inputFiles.description: Select previous worksheet versions to build upon

steps.name: Prepare Walkthrough
steps.description: Generate pre-read document with agenda from worksheet unknowns

inputFiles.label: Requirements Worksheet
inputFiles.description: Select the requirements worksheet to prepare walkthrough from

steps.name: Walkthrough Meeting
steps.description: 60-90 min meeting with customer to review worksheet and resolve unknowns

steps.name: Upload Walkthrough Transcript
steps.description: Upload the walkthrough meeting transcript

phases.name: User Story Implementation
phases.description: Create user stories, plan, implement, and QA each story

steps.name: Create User Stories
steps.description: Decompose finalized worksheet into sequenced user stories with dependency map

steps.name: Plan, Implement, and QA Each Story
steps.description: For each user story: plan, implement, and QA in sequence

steps.name: Generate Integration Test Plan
steps.description: Generate optimized cross-story integration test checklist after all stories pass QA

steps.name: Consultant Manual Verification
steps.description: Walk through org and verify each item in integration test plan. Mark PASS/FAIL

phases.name: Demo + UAT Handoff
phases.description: Generate UAT scripts, prepare demo, present to customer, and begin UAT cycle

steps.name: Generate UAT Test Scripts
steps.description: Generate customer-facing UAT test scripts in non-technical language

steps.name: Prepare Demo
steps.description: Generate demo script with UAT instructions for customer demo

inputFiles.label: UAT Scripts
inputFiles.description: Select UAT test scripts to include in demo prep

steps.name: Demo Meeting + UAT Handoff
steps.description: 60 min demo meeting with customer. Hand off UAT test scripts and begin UAT cycle

steps.name: Upload Demo Transcript
steps.description: Upload the demo meeting transcript

phases.name: Iteration Cycle
phases.description: Triage UAT feedback, implement changes, verify, and demo

steps.name: Collect UAT Feedback
steps.description: Receive customer feedback from UAT cycle (email, Slack, notes)

steps.name: Triage UAT Feedback
steps.description: Classify feedback as bugs, changes, new requirements, or out-of-scope. Creates/updates user stories

steps.name: Plan, Implement, and QA Triaged Stories
steps.description: For each triaged story: /salesforce-coe:sp:plan → /salesforce-coe:sp:implement → /salesforce-coe:sp:qa. Capture deviations with /salesforce-coe:sp:feedback

steps.name: Generate Integration Test Plan (Scoped)
steps.description: Generate integration test plan scoped to changed stories + regression on dependent stories

steps.name: Consultant Manual Verification
steps.description: Verify changes and run regression on dependent stories in the org

steps.name: Update UAT Test Scripts
steps.description: Generate updated customer-facing test scripts highlighting what changed

steps.name: Prepare Demo
steps.description: Generate changes summary and demo script for customer meeting

inputFiles.label: UAT Scripts
inputFiles.description: Select UAT test scripts to include in demo prep

steps.name: Demo Meeting + UAT Handoff
steps.description: 60 min demo meeting. Hand off updated UAT test scripts and begin next UAT cycle

steps.name: Upload Demo Transcript
steps.description: Upload the demo meeting transcript

phases.name: Final Delivery + Go-Live
phases.description: Final iteration, full regression testing, and customer sign-off

steps.name: Collect Final UAT Feedback
steps.description: Receive final customer feedback from last UAT cycle

steps.name: Triage Final Feedback
steps.description: Classify final feedback items and create/update stories

steps.name: Final Plan, Implement, and QA
steps.description: Implement and validate all remaining changes

steps.name: Full Regression Integration Test
steps.description: Generate complete end-to-end integration test plan covering all stories

steps.name: Full Manual Verification
steps.description: Complete end-to-end walkthrough of the entire org before sign-off

steps.name: Prepare Final Sign-off Meeting
steps.description: Generate deliverables checklist and sign-off documentation

steps.name: Final Sign-off Meeting
steps.description: 60 min meeting with customer for deliverables sign-off

steps.name: Upload Sign-off Transcript
steps.description: Upload the final sign-off meeting transcript

steps.name: Go-Live + Handoff
steps.description: Execute go-live plan and hand off documentation to customer
